storyBeat: 牛郎放牛 — 仙女從天而降

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Tonight's story has a few new words. Let's learn them first!
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚的故事會用到幾個新字，我們先把它們學會！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：今晚要講牛郎織女的故事，先來認識幾個關鍵字，記住了故事更好聽喔！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個字都在牛郎織女的故事裡：
🔑 cow = 牛
🔑 star = 星星
🔑 river = 河
🔑 sky = 天空

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Four more words — can you match them all?
questions.explanationZh:
再來四個：
🔑 bridge = 橋
🔑 weave = 織布
🔑 cloth = 布
🔑 magpie = 喜鵲

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one is a cow?
questions.question: Which one is a cow?
questions.explanationZh: 牛的英文是 cow 🐮！故事裡牛郎每天牽著一頭老牛到河邊——這就是故事的開始。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one shows a star?
questions.question: Which one shows a star?
questions.explanationZh: star = 星星 ⭐！故事裡牛郎和織女分隔在銀河兩岸，只能遙望星空。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Niulang took the cow to the river every day.
questions.sentenceZh: 牛郎每天牽著老牛到河邊。
questions.question: Which picture matches the sentence?
options: a boy leading a cow by the river
an old woman washing by a well
a girl weaving cloth at a loom
a bird flying over the mountains
optionsZh: 一個男孩牽著牛在河邊
一位老婆婆在井邊洗衣
一個女孩在織布機前織布
questions.explanationZh: river = 河，cow = 牛，句子說牛郎牽牛到河邊——圖中正好是一個男孩牽著牛在河邊。

storyBeat: 一起縫衣服 — 他們會成為家人嗎?

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: A few more words to learn — then the story begins!
questions.sentenceZh: 再記幾個字，故事就要開始了！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：再學幾個重要的字，學會了，故事就更好懂囉！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese phrase to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個片語都出現在牛郎織女的故事裡：
🔑 silver river = 銀河
🔑 white robe = 白袍
🔑 silk thread = 絲線
🔑 kind heart = 善良

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Zhinu wove cloth for the sky.
questions.sentenceZh: 織女為天空織布。
questions.question: Which picture matches 'weave cloth'?
options: a woman cooking rice in a pot
a girl riding fast on a horse
a woman weaving cloth on a loom
a boy climbing up a tall tree
optionsZh: 一個女人在鍋子裡煮飯
一個女人在織布機上織布
questions.explanationZh: weave cloth = 織布。織女的工作就是織布——圖中那位在織布機前的女人，就是她！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one shows a bridge?
questions.question: Which one shows a bridge?
questions.explanationZh: bridge = 橋 🌉！故事裡喜鵲們在銀河上搭成一座橋，讓牛郎和織女每年七夕相見。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Zhinu ___ cloth for the sky every day.
questions.sentenceHard: High above the earth, Zhinu ___ cloth for the sky from dawn to dusk.
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh:
主詞是 Zhinu（第三人稱單數），說的是每天的習慣，用現在簡單式，動詞要加 -s → weaves。
完整句：Zhinu weaves cloth for the sky every day.

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Let's review all the new words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
把這節的重點字再複習一遍：
🔑 bridge = 橋
🔑 cloth = 布
🔑 kind = 善良
🔑 magpie = 喜鵲

storyBeat: 王母娘娘下凡 — 仙女會被帶走嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的字，學起來：
🔑 queen = 王后
🔑 hard = 硬
🔑 cloud = 雲
🔑 work = 工作
其中「王后」是今晚最讓人緊張的角色——她一出場，事情就不一樣了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The Heavenly Queen watched from the high sky above.
questions.explanationZh: 王母娘娘從高高的天上看著這一切。奶奶說，能被她注意到，不一定是好事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her brow drew tight. Her lips made a thin line.
questions.question: How did the Queen feel about Zhinu staying below?
questions.explanationZh: 眉頭皺緊、嘴唇抿成一條線——這樣的表情，就是「一點都不滿意」的樣子。
questions.sentenceZh: 王母娘娘對織女留在凡間，心裡是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her face went hard. "Zhinu must come home and weave."
questions.explanationZh: 她臉色一沉，說：「織女必須回去織布。」奶奶說這句話的時候，輕輕嘆了口氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She did not smile. She did not bend.
questions.questionEn: Was the Queen open to talking?
questions.explanationZh: 她沒有微笑，沒有商量的意思——王母娘娘的臉，比銀河還冷。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 她沒有笑，也沒有要彎腰讓步的意思。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One day she came down on a long white cloud.
questions.explanationZh: 織女聽到這個消息，垂下了頭。奶奶說，這個畫面，讓人看了很不忍心。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the Heavenly Queen come down?
questions.question: How did she travel?
questions.explanationZh: 她駕著一條長長的白雲下來——就是「駕著長長的雲」。
questions.sentenceZh: 王母娘娘是怎麼從天上下來的？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Zhinu, go back to the sky. Your work is up there."
questions.explanationZh: 「織女，回去天上，你的工作在那裡。」奶奶說，這句話，沒有任何商量的餘地。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Zhinu shook her head. She held Niulang's hand tight.
questions.question: How did Zhinu answer the Queen?
options: showed she did not want to go
ran away to hide in a cloud
sang a happy song for them
lay down to sleep on the grass
questions.explanationZh: 織女搖搖頭，緊緊握住牛郎的手——這個動作，就是「表示不想走」。
questions.sentenceZh: 織女搖搖頭，把牛郎的手握得更緊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The Queen reached out her long thin hand.
questions.explanationZh: 王母娘娘伸出那細長的手……奶奶說，那個動作讓人忍不住屏住呼吸。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Would the Queen take her? Would Niulang stop her?
questions.explanationZh: 王母娘娘要把她帶走嗎？牛郎能阻止嗎？奶奶的聲音輕輕地，讓大家自己猜。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words about the Heavenly Queen.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的關鍵字：
🔑 heaven = 天上
🔑 frown = 皺眉
🔑 order = 命令
🔑 unbending = 不彎

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The Heavenly Queen watched from the high sky above.
questions.sentenceZh: 王母娘娘從高高的天上看著這一切。
questions.question: Where was the Heavenly Queen when she watched them?
questions.explanationZh: 「從高高的天上看著這一切」——王母娘娘是在「高高的天上」看著他們。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her brow drew tight. Her lips made a thin line.
questions.sentenceZh: 她眉頭皺緊，嘴唇抿成一條線。
questions.questionEn: Was the Heavenly Queen pleased with what she saw?
questions.explanationZh: 眉頭皺緊、嘴唇抿緊——那個表情，奶奶說，看了就知道麻煩來了。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She did not smile. She did not bend.
questions.sentenceZh: 她沒有笑，也沒有要彎腰讓步的意思。
questions.question: What kind of person was the Heavenly Queen?
options: shy and easy to talk to
questions.explanationZh: 不笑、不彎——「強硬不願妥協」，這就是她的樣子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Zhinu, go back to the sky. Your work is up there."
questions.sentenceZh: 「織女，回去天上，你的工作在那裡。」
questions.question: What did the Queen demand?
questions.explanationZh: 「回去天上，你的工作在那裡」——王母娘娘要織女「回天上去」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Zhinu shook her head. She held Niulang's hand tight.
questions.sentenceZh: 織女搖搖頭，把牛郎的手握得更緊。
questions.questionEn: Was Zhinu willing to go back to the sky?
questions.explanationZh: 她搖頭，緊緊握住他的手——那雙手什麼都說了，她不願意走。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One day she came down on a long white cloud.
questions.sentenceZh: 有一天，王母娘娘駕著長長的白雲下來。
questions.question: How did the Heavenly Queen travel to reach them?
questions.explanationZh: 「駕著長長的白雲下來」——她是「駕著雲下來」的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her face ___ hard as she gave her order.
questions.sentenceZh: 她臉色一沉，下達命令。
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 這是過去的故事，go 的過去式是 went——所以填 went。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The Queen reached out her long thin hand. What happened next?
questions.sentenceZh: 王母娘娘伸出那細長的手——接下來會發生什麼？
questions.question: What was the Queen about to do?
questions.explanationZh: 她伸出那細長的手——奶奶說這個動作讓人屏氣，她要「分開銀河」，把兩人分開。

storyBeat: 銀河出現 — 兩人被分開,還能再見嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的字，記好：
🔑 pin = 髮夾
🔑 line = 線
🔑 draw = 畫
🔑 side = 邊
其中「畫」這個字最重要——因為接下來，一個動作就改變了一切。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The Queen pulled a silver pin from her own hair.
questions.explanationZh: 王母娘娘從自己頭上拔下一根銀髮夾——奶奶說，那個動作，又快又決絕。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: It shone with cold light, sharp at one end.
questions.question: What was the silver pin like?
questions.explanationZh: 那根髮夾發著冷冷的光，一端很尖——「亮卻又尖」，就是它的樣子。
questions.sentenceZh: 那根銀髮夾是什麼樣子的？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She drew a line across the sky from east to west.
questions.explanationZh: 她從東到西，在天上畫了一條線。奶奶說，那一刻，世界就分成兩半了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In one breath the sky changed. In one breath all was new.
questions.questionEn: Did the magic take a long time?
questions.explanationZh: 「一口氣」——就是這樣，一個呼吸，兩個人的世界就分開了，哪裡需要很長時間。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 就在一口氣的時間，天空全變了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A great silver river flowed where she drew the line.
questions.explanationZh: 那條線劃過的地方，出現了一條巨大閃亮的銀河——從這裡看過去，寬得沒有邊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What appeared in the sky after the Queen drew the line?
questions.question: What appeared in the sky?
questions.explanationZh: 王母娘娘畫完線，天上出現了銀河——「銀色的河」。
questions.sentenceZh: 王母娘娘畫完那條線，天上出現了什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Niulang stood on one side. Zhinu stood far on the other.
questions.explanationZh: 牛郎站在這一邊，織女站在遠遠的那一邊——中間隔著一條無邊的銀河。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They reached out. Their fingers could not meet.
questions.question: How far apart were Niulang and Zhinu now?
questions.explanationZh: 兩人都伸出手，但手碰不到——當然是「遠到碰不到」，中間是整條銀河呀！
questions.sentenceZh: 兩人都伸出手，卻碰不到彼此。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Tears fell on both sides of the wide silver river.
questions.explanationZh: 銀河兩邊，都有眼淚滑落——奶奶說完這句，輕輕停了一下。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The silver river kept flowing. It would not stop. Would not...
questions.explanationZh: 銀河一直流，停不下來……奶奶說，就像思念，也停不下來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words about the silver river.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的關鍵字：
🔑 apart = 分開
🔑 wide = 寬
🔑 tear = 淚
🔑 wait = 等待

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The Queen pulled a silver pin from her own hair.
questions.sentenceZh: 王母娘娘從自己頭上拔下一根銀髮夾。
questions.question: What did the Queen use to create the silver river?
questions.explanationZh: 「從頭上拔下一根銀髮夾」——她用的是「銀色小髮夾」，一個小東西，卻改變了一切。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She drew a line across the sky from east to west.
questions.sentenceZh: 她從東到西，在天上畫了一條線。
questions.questionEn: Did the Queen draw the line from north to south?
questions.explanationZh: 「從東到西」——銀河就這樣橫跨了整片天，他怎麼可能從北到南找到她呢。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A great silver river flowed where she drew the line.
questions.sentenceZh: 那條線劃過的地方，出現了一條巨大閃亮的銀河。
questions.question: What appeared after the Queen drew the line?
questions.explanationZh: 「劃過的地方出現了一條巨大閃亮的銀河」——出現的是「寬闊閃亮的河」，就是銀河。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Niulang stood on one side. Zhinu stood far on the other.
questions.sentenceZh: 牛郎站在這一邊，織女站在遠遠的那一邊。
questions.question: How did the silver river change things?
questions.explanationZh: 牛郎在這邊、織女在那邊——銀河「把他們分得很遠」，再也碰不到。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They reached out. Their fingers could not meet.
questions.sentenceZh: 兩人都伸出手，卻碰不到彼此。
questions.questionEn: Could their hands touch across the silver river?
questions.explanationZh: 「伸出手，卻碰不到」——兩人都伸著手，中間卻隔著整條銀河，差那麼一點，差了一輩子。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Tears fell on both sides of the wide silver river.
questions.sentenceZh: 銀河兩邊，都有眼淚滑落。
questions.question: Who was crying beside the silver river?
questions.explanationZh: 「銀河兩邊都有眼淚」——兩邊都在哭，是「兩個人都哭了」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The Queen ___ a line across the sky with her silver pin.
questions.sentenceZh: 王母娘娘用銀髮夾在天空中劃了一條線。
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 這是過去故事中做的動作——draw 的過去式是 drew，所以填 drew。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The silver river kept flowing. It would not stop.
questions.sentenceZh: 銀河一直流，停不下來……
questions.question: What feeling does the never-stopping river bring?
questions.explanationZh: 銀河停不下來——就像思念停不下來，這樣的感覺是「止不住的思念」。

questions.sentence: She drew a line
accept: She drew a line across the sky
questions.explanationZh: draw 的過去式是 drew。「從東到西畫了一條線」——She drew a line。這一條線，改變了兩個人的一生。
questions.sentenceZh: 她從東到西畫了一條線。

questions.sentence: They could not touch
questions.explanationZh: could not 表示「無法做到」。兩人都伸出手，卻碰不到——They could not touch。中間隔著整條銀河，差那麼一點。
questions.sentenceZh: 兩人都伸出手，卻碰不到。

questions.sentence: The river kept them apart
accept: The silver river kept them apart
questions.explanationZh: keep apart = 讓…分開、隔開。銀河把兩個人永遠隔在兩岸——The river kept them apart。這句話說得出口，才真的懂這個故事有多難過。
questions.sentenceZh: 銀河把他們分開了。

questions.sentence: Niulang stood on one side. Zhinu stood far on the other. Tears fell on both sides of the wide silver river.
questions.question: Why did tears fall on both sides of the river?
options: Both Niulang and Zhinu were apart and full of longing
Niulang was angry at the silver river for being too wide
The rain began to fall and made the river overflow
Zhinu was happy to go back and cried with joy
optionsZh: 牛郎和織女都被分開了，心裡充滿思念
牛郎對銀河太寬感到很生氣
開始下雨，讓河水溢出來
織女很高興回去，開心地哭了
questions.explanationZh: 「兩邊都有眼淚」——不是一個人哭，是兩個人都心碎。他們隔著銀河，碰不到彼此，只能遙遙相望，思念讓眼淚止不住。

storyBeat: 牛郎追到天上 — 牛說了什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚再學 4 個字！
🔑 cry = 哭
🔑 skin = 皮
🔑 wear = 穿
🔑 lift = 抬
其中「lift」最特別——等一下你就知道，老牛用這個字做了什麼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Niulang sat by the river and cried for many days.
questions.explanationZh: 牛郎坐在河邊，哭了好多天。奶奶說，他眼淚都哭乾了，還是沒辦法。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He did not eat. He did not sleep. He just looked up.
questions.question: How was Niulang feeling without Zhinu?
questions.explanationZh: 不吃、不睡、只是抬頭看天——這就是「迷失又心碎」的樣子，奶奶說，看了好讓人心疼。
questions.sentenceZh: 他不吃不睡，只是一直仰頭看天。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old cow walked up slowly to where he sat.
questions.explanationZh: 老牛慢吞吞地走到牛郎身邊，低著頭，在他旁邊站下來。奶奶說，牛比人更懂事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old cow opened her mouth. Words came out clear.
questions.questionEn: Was the old cow an ordinary cow?
questions.explanationZh: 老牛張開嘴，說出話來——普通的牛不說話，但這頭牛，一直默默陪著他走了多少年。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 老牛張開嘴，清清楚楚地說出話來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Take my soft skin," she said. "Wear it like a cloak."
questions.explanationZh: 「把我柔軟的皮拿去，像披風一樣穿上，」她說。奶奶說這話的時候，眼眶紅了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "It will lift you up to the sky where she waits."
questions.question: What would the cow's skin help Niulang do?
questions.explanationZh: 「它會把你托上天，送到她身邊，」老牛說。穿上牛皮就能飛天——所以是「飛上天」。
questions.sentenceZh: 「它會把你托上天空，送你到她等候的地方。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Niulang put on the soft skin with kind tears in his eyes.
questions.explanationZh: 牛郎含著感激的淚，把柔軟的牛皮披上身。奶奶說，那一刻，他一定又哭又感謝。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His feet left the ground. The wind held him gently.
questions.question: What happened to Niulang?
questions.explanationZh: 腳離了地，風輕輕把他托住——他「開始上升」，飛向天空。
questions.sentenceZh: 他的腳慢慢離開地面，風輕輕把他捧起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What does the old cow do for Niulang?
questions.question: What does the cow do?
questions.explanationZh: 老牛的皮讓他飛上天——所以老牛是「幫他飛上天」。
questions.sentenceZh: 老牛幫牛郎做了什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The cow watched him rise. She did not speak again. Why...
questions.explanationZh: 老牛看著他慢慢升高，沒有再說話。奶奶說，有些話，說完了就夠了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words about the cow's gift.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的關鍵字：
🔑 sacrifice = 犧牲
🔑 cloak = 披風
🔑 fly = 飛
🔑 grateful = 感謝

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Niulang sat by the river and cried for many days.
questions.sentenceZh: 牛郎坐在河邊，哭了好多天。
questions.question: What did Niulang do after Zhinu was taken away?
options: found a new friend right away
went to work in the fields
questions.explanationZh: 「坐在河邊哭了好多天」——他做的是「坐在河邊哭泣」，難過得不能自已。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He did not eat. He did not sleep. He just looked up.
questions.sentenceZh: 他不吃不睡，只是一直仰頭看天。
questions.questionEn: Was Niulang taking good care of himself after Zhinu left?
questions.explanationZh: 不吃不睡——思念一個人的時候，哪裡還顧得了自己。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The old cow opened her mouth. Words came out clear.
questions.sentenceZh: 老牛張開嘴，清清楚楚地說出話來。
questions.question: What was surprising about the old cow?
options: spoke in a clear human voice
questions.explanationZh: 「老牛張開嘴，清楚地說出話來」——普通的牛不會說話，這是「用清晰的人聲說話」的奇蹟。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Take my soft skin," she said. "Wear it like a cloak."
questions.sentenceZh: 「把我柔軟的皮拿去，像披風一樣穿上，」她說。
questions.question: What did the cow offer to give Niulang?
questions.explanationZh: 「把我柔軟的皮拿去」——老牛送出的是「她自己柔軟的皮」，這是一份犧牲。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His feet left the ground. The wind held him gently.
questions.sentenceZh: 他的腳慢慢離開地面，風輕輕把他捧起來。
questions.questionEn: Did Niulang stay on the ground after wearing the skin?
questions.explanationZh: 「腳離了地，風把他托住」——老牛的情義，把他送上了天，他哪裡還在地上。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The cow watched him rise. She did not speak again.
questions.sentenceZh: 老牛看著他慢慢升高，沒有再說話。
questions.question: Why did the cow stay silent after Niulang rose?
options: she was too cold to talk
questions.explanationZh: 把禮物送出去就夠了——「她的禮物已夠了」，不需要再多說什麼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His feet ___ the ground as the wind gently held him.
questions.sentenceZh: 風輕輕把他捧起，他的腳離了地。
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 這是過去故事中的動作——leave 的過去式是 left，所以填 left。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Niulang put on the soft skin with kind tears in his eyes.
questions.sentenceZh: 牛郎含著感激的淚，把柔軟的牛皮披上身。
questions.question: How did Niulang feel as he put on the skin?
questions.explanationZh: 「含著感激的淚」——牛郎是「感動又感謝」，感謝老牛的犧牲。

storyBeat: 喜鵲聚集 — 鵲橋是什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的最後幾個字！
🔑 magpie = 喜鵲
🔑 wing = 翅膀
🔑 bridge = 橋
🔑 middle = 中間
其中「鵲橋」就是用喜鵲翅膀搭的橋——這是牛郎織女最美麗的傳說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: All the magpies in the world flew up to the silver river.
questions.explanationZh: 世界上所有的喜鵲，全都飛到銀河邊。奶奶說，就像大家都知道，有人需要幫忙。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The whole sky went black with their feathers.
questions.question: How many magpies came to help?
questions.explanationZh: 喜鵲多到整片天空都黑掉了——這當然是「多到數不清」。
questions.sentenceZh: 喜鵲飛來了多少隻？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They held wing to wing across the wide silver river.
questions.explanationZh: 喜鵲翅膀連著翅膀，橫跨整條寬銀河——奶奶說，那個畫面，是奇跡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Niulang stepped on. The black backs held him up.
questions.questionEn: Was the magpie bridge strong enough for him?
questions.explanationZh: 牛郎踩上去，黑黑的鵲背把他穩穩撐住——千萬隻喜鵲，都是為了這一步。答 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 牛郎踩上去，喜鵲的背把他穩穩地撐住了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They made a long black bridge across the sky.
questions.explanationZh: 一座長長的黑色橋橫跨天空——那就是傳說中的「鵲橋」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the magpies make in the sky?
questions.question: What did they make?
questions.explanationZh: 喜鵲翅膀連翅膀，搭成一座橋——「黑色的橋」，就是鵲橋。
questions.sentenceZh: 喜鵲在天上做出了什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Niulang ran on the magpie bridge. Zhinu ran toward him.
questions.explanationZh: 牛郎在橋上跑，織女從對面跑過來——奶奶說，那段路，跑得飛快，心也跳得飛快。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They met in the middle of the sky and held each other tight.
questions.question: Where did Niulang and Zhinu meet again?
questions.explanationZh: 他們在天空的正中間相遇——「橋上的高處」，就是那個地方。
questions.sentenceZh: 牛郎和織女在哪裡再度相遇？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They both cried, but this time the tears were warm and glad.
questions.explanationZh: 兩人都哭了，但這次是開心的淚——奶奶說，這種淚，是最珍貴的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The magpie bridge held just for tonight. Just for them. Just...
questions.explanationZh: 鵲橋只為今晚撐住，只為他們——奶奶說，就這一晚，他們要好好珍惜。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words about the magpie bridge.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的關鍵字：
🔑 miracle = 奇跡
🔑 back = 背
🔑 meet again = 相見
🔑 glad tears = 高興的淚

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: All the magpies in the world flew up to the silver river.
questions.sentenceZh: 世界上所有的喜鵲，全都飛到銀河邊。
questions.question: Why did all the magpies come?
questions.explanationZh: 喜鵲全聚集在銀河——等一下翅膀連翅膀搭成橋，他們是「來搭橋」的！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The whole sky went black with their feathers.
questions.sentenceZh: 喜鵲多到整片天空都黑掉了。
questions.questionEn: Were there only a few magpies in the sky?
questions.explanationZh: 整片天空都黑掉了——世界上所有的喜鵲，都來了，就為了幫這兩個人。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They held wing to wing across the wide silver river.
questions.sentenceZh: 喜鵲翅膀連著翅膀，橫跨整條寬銀河。
questions.question: How did the magpies form a bridge?
options: linked their wings side by side
questions.explanationZh: 「翅膀連著翅膀」橫跨銀河——就是「翅膀肩並肩相連」，搭成了橋。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Niulang ran on the magpie bridge. Zhinu ran toward him.
questions.sentenceZh: 牛郎在橋上跑，織女從對面跑過來。
questions.question: How did they move on the magpie bridge?
questions.explanationZh: 「牛郎跑，織女跑過來」——兩個人都「跑向彼此」！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They met in the middle of the sky and held each other tight.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們在天空的正中間相遇，緊緊抱在一起。
questions.questionEn: Was the place they met on the ground?
questions.explanationZh: 「在天空的正中間相遇」——那個相遇的地方，在鵲橋的最高處，半空中，不在地上。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They both cried, but this time the tears were warm and glad.
questions.sentenceZh: 兩人都哭了，但這次是開心的淚。
questions.question: How were these tears different from before?
questions.explanationZh: 「這次的眼淚是溫暖且開心的」——不再是悲傷，是「因為喜悅落淚」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The magpie bridge ___ just for tonight.
questions.sentenceZh: 鵲橋只為今晚撐住。
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 這是過去故事中的狀態——hold 的過去式是 held，所以填 held。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The magpie bridge held just for tonight. Just for them.
questions.sentenceZh: 鵲橋只為今晚撐住，只為他們。
questions.question: What does 'just for tonight' make you feel?
questions.explanationZh: 「只有今晚」——知道很快就要分開，這一刻「珍貴卻即將消失」，讓人很心疼。

storyBeat: 七夕一年一見 — 為什麼這天看星星?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚最後一組字！
🔑 year = 年
🔑 moon = 月
🔑 night = 夜
🔑 remember = 記得
其中「記得」最重要——等一下，這個故事就是你永遠會記得的那種。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The Queen saw them meet. Her heart became a little soft.
questions.explanationZh: 王母娘娘看到他們相見，她的心稍微軟了一點。奶奶說，連她都忍不住。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She thought of her own family far above the clouds.
questions.question: Why did the Queen become a little soft?
questions.explanationZh: 她想到了自己在天上的家人——那種想念，讓她的心稍微軟了，所以是「想念自己的家人」。
questions.sentenceZh: 她想起了自己遠在天上的家人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Once each year," she said, "on the seventh night of the seventh moon."
questions.explanationZh: 「每年一次，在七月的第七個夜晚，」她說。奶奶說這句話，語氣輕輕的，像是一份禮物。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every other night, the silver river kept them apart.
questions.questionEn: Could they meet many times a year?
questions.explanationZh: 其他每一個夜晚，銀河都把他們分開——三百六十四個夜晚的等待，只為換那一晚相見。答 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 除了那一晚，銀河每天都把他們隔開。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "The magpies will come. You may meet on the bridge for one night."
questions.explanationZh: 「喜鵲會來，你們可以在橋上見面一晚。」奶奶說，只有一晚，但那一晚，勝過一切。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How often can Niulang and Zhinu meet?
questions.question: How often do they meet?
questions.explanationZh: 七月七日，一年就這麼一次——「一年只見一次」。
questions.sentenceZh: 牛郎和織女多久能相見一次？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: And so every Qixi, Chinese families look up at the sky.
questions.explanationZh: 所以每年七夕,中華家庭都會抬頭看天。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They tell the story to their children under the bright stars.
questions.question: What do Chinese families do on Qixi night?
questions.explanationZh: 推理: 對孩子講故事 → 說這個古老故事 (paraphrase)。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Children point at two bright stars across the silver river.
questions.explanationZh: 孩子們指著銀河兩端的兩顆亮星。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One star on each side. Waiting. Until next year. Until next Qixi...
questions.explanationZh: 兩邊各一顆星。等待。等到明年。等到下一個七夕……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the festival words from this ending.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚結尾的關鍵字：
🔑 legend = 傳說
🔑 every year = 每年
🔑 look up = 仰頭
🔑 star = 星星

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The Queen saw them meet. Her heart became a little soft.
questions.sentenceZh: 王母娘娘看到他們相見，她的心稍微軟了一點。
questions.question: Why did the Queen's heart soften?
questions.explanationZh: 「她想到了自己遠在天上的家人」——思念家人的感覺，讓她的心「稍微軟了一點」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Once each year," she said, "on the seventh night of the seventh moon."
questions.sentenceZh: 「每年一次，在七月的第七個夜晚，」她說。
questions.questionEn: Did the Queen allow them to meet every month?
questions.explanationZh: 「每年一次」——不是每個月，一整年的思念，就只有七夕這一晚。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "The magpies will come. You may meet on the bridge for one night."
questions.sentenceZh: 「喜鵲會來，你們可以在橋上見面一晚。」
questions.question: How long could they stay together each year?
questions.explanationZh: 「在橋上見面一晚」——每年只有「一個晚上」可以相聚。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: And so every Qixi, Chinese families look up at the sky.
questions.sentenceZh: 所以每年七夕，中華家庭都會抬頭看天。
questions.question: Why do people look up at the sky on Qixi?
questions.explanationZh: 七夕就是牛郎和織女相見的日子——人們抬頭，是「尋找那兩顆星」，一顆牽牛，一顆織女。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every other night, the silver river kept them apart.
questions.sentenceZh: 除了那一晚，銀河每天都把他們隔開。
questions.questionEn: Were Niulang and Zhinu apart for most of the year?
questions.explanationZh: 「除了那一晚，每天都被隔開」——銀河一直流，思念也一直流，他們大部分的時間都是分開的。答 Yes。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They tell the story to their children under the bright stars.
questions.sentenceZh: 大家對孩子說這個故事，就在那片明亮的星空下。
questions.question: When do Chinese families tell this story?
options: under the night stars on Qixi
questions.explanationZh: 「在明亮的星星下說故事」，配合七夕節日——就是在「七夕夜晚在星空下」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Children ___ at two bright stars across the silver river.
questions.sentenceZh: 孩子們指著銀河兩端的兩顆亮星。
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 這是故事結尾說「過去」發生的事——point 的過去式是 pointed，所以填 pointed。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: After a whole year apart, the two lovers finally ___.
questions.sentenceHard: After waiting a whole year on each side of the silver river, the two lovers finally ___.
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh:
這是過去發生的故事——meet 的過去式是 met（不規則動詞）。
完整句：After a whole year apart, the two lovers finally met.

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One star on each side. Waiting. Until next Qixi.
questions.sentenceZh: 兩邊各一顆星。等待。等到下一個七夕……
questions.question: What word best fits this ending?
questions.explanationZh: 愛人隔著銀河等待——這樣的結局是「甜中帶苦」，又溫柔又讓人心疼。
